common.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
common.passwordHint: At least 8 characters. Mix letters, numbers and symbols.

shared.passwordsDontMatch: The two passwords do not match.
shared.rateLimitBody: For security reasons, please wait {time} before trying again.

resetSuccess.title: Password updated
resetSuccess.body: You can now sign in with your new password.

phoneStep.heading: Activate my account
phoneStep.intro: Enter your phone number. You will receive a verification code by SMS to activate your account and choose your password.

verifyStep.heading: Verification
verifyStep.introWithPhone: Enter the 6-digit code sent to {phone}, then choose your password.

success.heading: Account activated
success.body: Your account is active. You can now sign in with your phone number and password.

forgotPassword.heading: Forgotten password
forgotPassword.intro: Enter your phone number. If an active account is linked to it, you will receive a code by SMS to reset your password.

sessionExpired.title: Session expired
sessionExpired.body: Please sign in again to continue.

resetPassword.heading: New password
resetPassword.introWithPhone: Enter the code sent to {phone} and choose your new password.
resetPassword.introWithoutPhone: Enter the code received by SMS and choose a new password.

dashboard.forbiddenBody: Your profile does not have the rights required to view these indicators.
dashboard.comingSoonChart: Chart coming soon — time-series endpoint under implementation.

financialPerformance.title: Financial Performance
financialPerformance.subtitle: Trend of principal balance and collection over the period.

field.title: Workspace
field.intro: Your figures and your next actions for the day.

teller.subtitle: Teller dashboard

drawer.title: My till
drawer.noneBody: No cash session is open. Open your till to start the day.
drawer.liveNote: The running balance and the cash difference are calculated at close.

tips.t1: Confirm the account holder and account number before each transaction.
tips.t2: Count the cash and check the total before validating.
tips.t3: Check the signature specimen for every withdrawal.

teller.demoNote: Demonstration data — will be connected to the backend once the endpoint is available.

minimal.title: Welcome {name}
minimal.body: Your account is active. Your administrator will assign you a role to unlock the corresponding features.

guarantors.pageDescription: Read-only, institution-wide view of all guarantors. Management happens on the client record.

proxies.pageDescription: Read-only, institution-wide view of all proxies. Management happens on the client record.

clients.pageDescription: List of the institution's clients. Creation, editing, status and KYC workflow.

drawer.createHint: Enter the new client's information. KYC starts in "Draft" status and moves to review after submission.

fields.agencyEditHint: The branch cannot be changed after creation.

kycReason.reasonPlaceholder: Describe the reason for rejection (visible in audit log)…
kycReason.reasonRequired: A reason is required for a rejection.
kycReason.selfVerifyHint: Tick only if you submitted this KYC. Requires a reason and the “self-verify override” permission — otherwise the operation is refused (403).
kycReason.selfVerifyReasonRequired: A reason is required for self-verification.

clientDetail.piiRedactedBody: You lack the “crm.pii.view” permission. Personal fields (name, phone, email, address…) are masked — an empty field may therefore be masked rather than absent.

loans.title: Client loans
loans.comingSoon: Client loans arrive with phase P11 (Credit — Origination).

action.reasonPlaceholder: Describe the reason (visible in audit log)…
action.reasonRequired: A reason is required for this action.
action.selfVerifyHint: Tick only if you submitted this record. Requires a reason and the “self-verify override” permission — otherwise the operation is refused.
action.selfVerifyReasonRequired: A reason is required for self-verification.

drawer.hint: Enter the document's information. It starts in "Draft" status.

fields.documentHint: Photo of the document (front). Required in order to verify the KYC document.
fields.documentBackHint: Photo of the back. Required for this type before verification.
fields.expiryRequiredHint: Required for this type before verification.
fields.authorityHint: Body that issued the document (e.g. DGSN for the national ID card). Optional.
fields.expiredWarning: ⚠ This expiry date has passed — the document cannot be verified. Enter a future date.

toast.createdBody: The document has been saved as a draft.

fields.name: Full name
fields.relationshipHint: The guarantor's relationship to the client.
fields.documentTypeHint: Type of the guarantor's identity document.
fields.documentHint: Guarantor's identity document (front). Required in order to verify the guarantor.
fields.documentBackHint: Photo of the back. Required for this document type before verification.

toast.createdBody: The guarantor has been saved as a draft.

drawer.hint: Enter the proxy's information and the mandate terms.

fields.name: Full name
fields.mandateTypeHint: General power of attorney, specific operations, etc.
fields.documentHint: Proxy's identity document (front). Required in order to verify the proxy.
fields.documentBackHint: Photo of the back. Required for this document type before verification.

toast.createdBody: The proxy has been saved as a draft.

rolesPage.pageDescription: Select a role to view and edit its permissions. Changes are saved only after you click "Save".
rolesPage.emptySelection: Select a role from the list on the left to view and edit its permissions.

editor.title: Permissions for {name}
editor.confirmDiscard: Unsaved changes will be lost. Continue?
editor.protectedRoleBody: This role is marked as protected: some permissions cannot be removed or added. The API will reject any change that violates these constraints.
editor.protectedLockHint: Protected permission: not grantable to this role (platform-admin only, or delegation disabled on the back end).
editor.staleConflict: This role's permissions changed since they were loaded. The list was reloaded — review, then reapply your selection.

staffUsers.pageDescription: Create and edit users, assign roles, and manage the status of the institution's users.

drawer.createHint: Enter the new user's details and select their roles; they will receive an activation SMS to complete their registration.
drawer.editHint: The phone number cannot be changed from this screen.
drawer.rolesHint: Roles are assigned immediately after creation.
drawer.activationNotice: The account will be created with status "Pending activation". An activation SMS will be sent to the user, who will choose their password while completing registration.

fields.name: Full name
fields.phoneEditHint: Editable only through a phone number change workflow.

toast.createdBody: {name} has been created. An activation SMS has been sent to them.
toast.createdWithRolesBody: {name} has been created with {count} role(s). An activation SMS has been sent to them.
toast.createdRolesFailedTitle: User created but roles not assigned
toast.createdRolesFailedBody: {name} has been created, but role assignment failed: {error}. You can fix this via "Manage roles".

agencies.pageDescription: List of the institution's branches. Creation, editing, status and manager.

drawer.createHint: Enter the details of the new branch.

managerDrawer.title: Transfer management
managerDrawer.subtitle: Branch {code} — {name}
managerDrawer.publicIdHint: Only users who already hold the “agency-manager” role are listed. To promote a teller, grant them that role first in User management.
managerDrawer.roleAtAgencyHint: Job title held WITHIN this branch (e.g. agency-manager) — distinct from the system permission roles. Leave “agency-manager” by default.

toast.createdBody: Branch {name} has been added to the list.

accounts.pageDescription: Branch customer accounts: balances, transactions and lifecycle.

drawer.createHint: Enter the holder and account details.
drawer.editHint: The holder and account number cannot be changed.

fields.agencyEditHint: The branch cannot be changed after creation.
fields.title: Account title
fields.titleHint: Defaults to the holder's name. Editable (joint account, company, group…).
fields.ledgerAccountHint: Optional — if left blank, the account inherits the product's ledger account.
fields.noLedgerAccounts: No active ledger account in this branch. Create one in Ledger accounts.
fields.accountProductHint: Optional — to be entered manually for now.

proxies.title: Account proxies
proxies.empty: No proxy linked to this account.
proxies.manageHint: Proxies are managed from the customer's profile.

signatures.title: Signature specimens
signatures.addHint: Upload the specimen image (signature or fingerprint) and save it; it becomes active and usable for withdrawals.

create.title: New signature specimen
create.hint: Upload the signature/fingerprint image and enter the signatory.
create.specimenHint: Photo or scan of the signature (or fingerprint) — PNG/JPEG.

holds.title: Holds
holds.releaseIntro: Release the held funds for this account?

fields.reasonHint: Free text (e.g. court seizure, pending transaction).

guarantees.pageDescription: Guarantors (sureties) and collateral items attached to a loan.
guarantees.selectLoanPrompt: Select a loan to manage its collateral.

loanSelector.label: Loan
loanSelector.releaseHint: Collateral can only be released after the loan is closed.

obligation.intro: Guarantors committed to this loan (sureties). The guarantor must be a verified guarantor of the client.
obligation.title: Guarantors
obligation.empty: No guarantor attached to this loan.

fields.noGuarantors: No verified guarantor for this client. Add one from the client profile.
fields.amountHint: Amount in currency. Leave empty if the guarantee is a percentage.
fields.releaseConditionHint: When the surety ends. The release takes effect when the loan is closed.

drawer.hint: Attach a verified guarantor and specify the coverage.

toast.createdBody: The guarantor obligation has been created.
toast.updatedBody: The guarantor obligation has been updated.
toast.cancelledBody: The guarantor obligation has been cancelled.
toast.releasedBody: The guarantor obligation has been released.

collateral.intro: Items pledged as loan collateral (real estate, movable property…). Each collateral can contain several items.
collateral.empty: No collateral item for this loan.

drawer.hint: The type determines the fields of the items added afterwards.

hint.real_estate: Enter the land registry references of the property.
hint.personal_guarantee: Describe the object of the surety.

toast.createdBody: The item has been added to the collateral.

clientSelector.label: Client
clientSelector.hint: Select the client first to filter their loans.

guarantees.selectClientPrompt: Select a client to display their loans.

loanTransfers.pageDescription: Reassign the manager of several loans to a new manager.
loanTransfers.selectAgencyPrompt: Select the branch on which to perform the transfer.
loanTransfers.needTarget: Select a target manager to confirm.
loanTransfers.preview: You are about to transfer {count} loan(s) — total outstanding {total} — to {manager}.
loanTransfers.previewNoTarget: {count} loan(s) selected — total outstanding {total}. Choose a target manager.

fields.agencyHint: Determines the managers and loans offered.
fields.targetManagerHint: Managers (loan officer / supervisor) of the selected branch.
fields.reasonHint: Required — retained in the audit trail (max 255).

list.title: Transferable loans — branch {agency}
list.empty: No transferable loan for this manager (branch, status, or already managed by them).

confirmDialog.title: Confirm transfer
confirmDialog.description: You are about to transfer {count} loan(s) to {manager}. This action reassigns the manager of each selected loan.

loans.pageDescription: Creation and tracking of loans: origination, approvals, repayment schedule generation.

drawer.createHint: Enter the client, product and amount. The loan is created as a draft.
drawer.editHint: The client and product cannot be changed after creation. Editing is possible while the loan is a draft.

fields.clientEditHint: The client cannot be changed after creation.
fields.productEditHint: The product cannot be changed after creation.
fields.creditAgentHint: Only users with the “loan-officer” (credit agent) role are listed. Grant that role first if needed.
fields.amountHint: Amount in currency (XAF). Must comply with the product limits.
fields.accountsNeedClient: Select a client first to link their accounts.

toast.createdBody: Loan {number} has been created as a draft.

loanDetail.feesHint: Amounts computed by the engine (product snapshot at origination). Read-only.
loanDetail.outstandingHint: Computed by the API from the schedule and repayments. “—” means no outstanding is projected yet.

linkedAccounts.title: Linked accounts
linkedAccounts.hint: Update the recovery / unpaid / amortization / transfer accounts. The account must belong to the loan's client and agency, and be active.
linkedAccounts.noAccounts: This client has no linkable account. Create a customer account first.

schedule.title: Repayment schedule
schedule.subtitle: Generate the repayment schedule from the loan and product terms.
schedule.notEligible: The schedule can only be generated on an approved or rescheduled loan.
schedule.persistenceNote: Active amortization schedule loaded from the API; it stays available after a reload. “Regenerate” replaces the active snapshot.
schedule.emptyNotEligible: Schedule unavailable: the loan must first be approved.

visa.title: Approval workflow
visa.historyNote: Approval history loaded from the API: who signed off, when, and the decision, for each of the 4 steps.

stepHint.montage: Review of the file and documents by the loan officer.

drawer.title: {step} — {decision}
drawer.hint: Add a comment (optional) then confirm the decision.

drawer.title: Change status → {status}
drawer.hint: Optional reason and notes, retained in the audit trail.

loanProducts.pageDescription: Loan product catalogue: limits, frequencies, rates, fees, penalties and ledger accounts.

drawer.createHint: Define the loan type and its parameters.
drawer.editHint: The code cannot be changed after creation.

fields.codeEditHint: The code cannot be changed after creation.
fields.name: Product name
fields.depositValueHint: Percentage or amount depending on the selected type.
fields.penaltyGraceDaysHint: Period (in days) after the due date before a penalty is applied. The field actually used by the engine.
fields.penaltyHint: Penalty applied each arrears period. The engine uses the value type, value and base; the value frozen when the loan was created takes precedence over later product edits.
fields.penaltyValueAmountHint: Flat amount in FCFA charged each arrears period.
fields.penaltyValueRateHint: Percentage rate (e.g. 2 = 2%) applied to the chosen base each period.
fields.penaltyValueTypeHint: Flat amount or percentage of the base.
fields.penaltyFormulaTypeHint: Descriptive label frozen onto the loan; does not affect the calculation.
fields.penaltyFormulaBaseHint: The amount the percentage applies to.
fields.ledgerAccountHint: Ledger account inherited by default by loans created with this product (P16 selector coming soon).
fields.policiesHint: Enables a named calculation policy (a formula configured on the back end). Leave unchecked if not used.
fields.policyPenaltyDisabledHint: Unavailable: this policy is not approved on the back end (attaching it causes loan creation to fail). See back-issues #16.
fields.policyUnapprovedHint: Unavailable: policy not approved on the back end (formula-policies catalog). Attaching it causes loan creation to fail.
fields.statusHint: Archiving is done via the "Archive" action.

accountProducts.pageDescription: Customer account product catalogue: family, minimum balance, overdraft policy.

drawer.createHint: Define the account type and its rules.
drawer.editHint: The code and agency cannot be changed.

fields.codeEditHint: The code cannot be changed after creation.
fields.name: Product name
fields.agencyEditHint: The agency cannot be changed after creation.
fields.ledgerAccountHint: Ledger account inherited by default by accounts created with this product.
fields.noLedgerAccounts: No active ledger account in this agency. Create one under General accounts.
fields.statusHint: Archiving is done via the "Archive" action.

delinquencies.pageDescription: Tracking of follow-ups and recovery attempts on a loan.
delinquencies.selectLoanPrompt: Select a loan to manage its tracking and recoveries.

loanSelector.label: Loan
loanSelector.notRecoverable: Recovery is only possible on a disbursed / active / rescheduled loan.

tracking.intro: Follow-ups, appointments and payment promises recorded on this loan.
tracking.title: Follow-ups
tracking.empty: No follow-ups recorded for this loan.

drawer.hint: Record the follow-up and any payment promise.

report.heading: Delinquency tracking — Follow-ups
report.popupBlockedBody: Allow pop-ups for this site to print or export to PDF.

recovery.intro: Attempts to recover the requested amount by debiting the client accounts linked to the loan.
recovery.notRecoverable: Recovery is only possible on a disbursed / active / rescheduled loan.
recovery.title: Recovery attempts

drawer.title: Recovery attempt
drawer.hint: The engine debits the client accounts linked to the loan up to the requested amount.

toast.nothingBody: No available balance on the linked accounts.

clientSelector.label: Client
clientSelector.hint: Select the client first to filter their loans.

delinquencies.selectClientPrompt: Select a client to display their loans.

disbursement.pageDescription: Approved loans ready to be disbursed.

fields.transferAccountHint: Client account credited with the loan amount.
fields.noAccounts: This client has no account. Create one first.
fields.tellerSessionHint: Open till session for the loan agency.
fields.noOpenSessions: No open till session in the loan agency. Open one first.

drawer.title: Disburse — {number}
drawer.hint: Disbursement creates a ledger entry (requires ledger accounts — P16).

setupCharges.title: Setup charges
setupCharges.intro: Disbursement is only possible once the setup charges are collected (fee, tax, guarantee deposit).
setupCharges.assessNeeded: Setup charges have not been assessed for this loan yet. Run the assessment to compute them.
setupCharges.none: No charge to collect for this product.
setupCharges.allSettled: All charges are settled. You can disburse.
setupCharges.pending: {count} charge(s) left to collect before disbursement.
setupCharges.loanAssuranceNote: Loan assurance is informational and does not block disbursement.
setupCharges.cashSourceNote: Cash settlement goes through an open teller session.
setupCharges.noSessions: No open cash session in the agency.

decision.pageDescription: Loans under decision: submit, return, reject. Detailed approvals are done on the loan file.

ledgerAccounts.pageDescription: Institution's chart of accounts: directory of general ledger accounts, their balance and movements.

fields.codeEditHint: The code is immutable after creation.
fields.name: Name
fields.classEditHint: The class is immutable after creation.
fields.agencyHint: Leave empty for an institutional account (all agencies).
fields.parentHint: Links this account to a higher-level account.
fields.normalSideHint: Side that increases the account. Pre-filled based on the class.
fields.statusHint: An inactive account can no longer be posted to.

drawer.createHint: Set the code, class and normal balance side of the account.
drawer.editHint: The code, class and agency cannot be modified.

archive.title: Archive this account?
archive.body: The account "{name}" will be archived and can no longer be posted to. This action can be reversed by reactivating it.

sectors.pageDescription: Directory of clients' economic business sectors and sub-sectors. Select a sector on the left to manage its sub-sectors.

fields.codeEditHint: The code is immutable after creation.
fields.name: Name

master.title: Sectors
master.empty: No sector. Create one to get started.

detail.noSelection: Select a sector to view its sub-sectors.
detail.title: Sub-sectors — {name}
detail.subtitle: {code} · {count} sub-sector(s)

sectorDrawer.hint: Code, name and status of the business sector.

subSectorDrawer.hint: Link the sub-sector to a parent sector.

delete.sectorBody: The sector "{name}" will be permanently deleted.
delete.sectorBodyWithChildren: The sector "{name}" contains {count} sub-sector(s). Delete them first, otherwise the deletion will be rejected by the server.
delete.subTitle: Delete this sub-sector?
delete.subBody: The sub-sector "{name}" will be permanently deleted.

journalEntries.pageDescription: Manual journal entries: capture, approval and posting. An entry moves through draft → submitted → approved → posted.

fields.referenceHint: Unique identifier of the entry (e.g. ME-2026-001).

createDrawer.title: New miscellaneous entry
createDrawer.hint: Create the header; you will add the lines afterwards.
createDrawer.afterHint: After creation, add at least two balanced lines before submitting.

detail.title: ME {reference}
detail.noAccounts: No active account for this agency. Create one in General ledger accounts.
detail.amountHint: Amount in main unit (will be converted).
detail.noLines: No line. Add lines to balance the entry.
detail.addLineInvalid: Select an account and enter a positive amount.
detail.makerCheckerHint: You captured this entry: its approval requires a different reviewer (segregation of duties).

confirm.postBody: The entry will be posted and recorded in the general ledger. It will become immutable (only reversal will be possible).
confirm.reverseBody: A reversing entry will be created to cancel the effects of this posted entry.

toast.createdBody: The ME "{reference}" has been created. Add its lines.

journal.pageDescription: View the journal: all accounting entries (manual or generated by operations), with the detail of their lines.

tills.pageDescription: Directory of the agency's till positions. The daily state (open/closed) is driven by the cash sessions.

fields.codeEditHint: The code is immutable after creation.
fields.name: Name
fields.agencyHint: Required for an administrator without an agency.
fields.tellerHint: Tellers (teller role) of the agency. A teller holds only one active till at a time.
fields.noTellers: No teller ("teller" role) in this agency. Leave empty or create/assign a teller first.
fields.ledgerAccountHint: Active asset account of the agency (cash).
fields.amountHint: Amount in main unit (will be converted).

drawer.hint: Set the code, teller and limits of the till.

sessions.pageDescription: Opening and closing of cash sessions. A session opens a till for a day with a declared fund.

fields.tillHint: Only active and closed tills can receive a session.
fields.tellerHint: Tellers (teller role) of the till's agency.
fields.tellerLocked: Teller assigned to this till — not editable.
fields.noTellersAgency: No teller ("teller" role) in this till's agency.
fields.openingHint: Amount in main unit (will be converted).
fields.closingHint: Amount in main unit (will be converted).

openDrawer.title: Open a cash session
openDrawer.hint: Select the till and declare the opening fund.

closeDrawer.title: Close the session
closeDrawer.hint: Declare the cash fund actually counted at closing.

cashTx.pageDescription: Cash movements (deposits and withdrawals) on an open till session.

noSession.title: No open session
noSession.body: Cash transactions require an open session. Open your till first.

readOnly.title: View only
readOnly.body: You do not have permission to record cash transactions.

fields.noAccounts: No active account for this client in this agency.
fields.amountHint: Amount in the main unit (will be converted).
fields.noSignatures: No active signature specimen on this account — required for a withdrawal.

cashTx.overAvailable: The amount exceeds the account's available balance.

denominations.hint: This till requires a denomination breakdown. The counted total must equal the transaction amount.
denominations.mismatch: The denomination total must equal the transaction amount.

account.balanceUnavailable: Balance unavailable (permission required) — the over-withdrawal check is inactive.

cashTx.methodNote: Cheque / mixed not supported by this till for now.

summary.title: Transaction summary
summary.feesNote: Any fees are applied when the transaction is posted.

tips.title: Teller tips
tips.t1: Always confirm the account number and holder before submitting.
tips.t2: Count the cash and verify the total.
tips.t3: For a withdrawal, verify the holder's signature specimen.

confirm.title: Confirm transaction
confirm.body: Review the information below before submitting the cash transaction.

reverseConfirm.title: Reverse this transaction?
reverseConfirm.body: A reversing entry will be created to cancel this cash transaction.

cashInspection.pageDescription: Inspect a cash session: details, theoretical/actual balances, difference and a printable cash-up.

recon.title: Cash-ups / reconciliations
recon.createHint: Count the cash; the cash-up is only recorded when actual = theoretical (zero difference).
recon.beforeCloseBody: Closing the session does not save a cash-up: the final count would only live in the audit log. Record a cash-up here while the session is open to keep the counting document.

cashInspection.createNote: The cash-up is only recorded when the counted actual balance equals the theoretical balance (zero difference).

filters.title: Filters
filters.truncated: Too many sessions: only the {count} most recent are loaded (server-side filtering pending). Narrow by date.
filters.tooMany: Showing {shown} of {total} sessions. Narrow the filters to see the rest.

cashDraft.pageDescription: Day-by-day view of cash sessions: opening/closing fund and status.
cashDraft.lineLevelNote: Line-by-line cash movements will be available once the teller-transactions list endpoint is delivered.

globalClientImage.pageDescription: Read-only 360° view of a client: profile, accounts, loans, guarantors, proxies and identity documents.
globalClientImage.selectPrompt: Search and select a client to display their global view.

loans.title: Loans
loans.note: Filtered client-side over loaded loans (a server-side per-client filter is expected).

reports.generateDisabled: No report definition is available for this type. Already-generated reports remain viewable and printable.

generateDrawer.title: Generate a report
generateDrawer.description: Pick the report and its parameters; the result is computed immediately.
generateDrawer.successBody: The report was computed and added to the list.

reports.unavailableType: No matching report type is exposed by the API for this section.
reports.empty: No report generated for this type.

exigible.title: Loan outstanding / due
exigible.description: Outstanding and due reports for the loan portfolio.

balance.title: Trial balance
balance.description: Trial balance, general ledger and EMF/COBAC balance.

batch.pageDescription: Catalog of batch procedures and their runs (close verifications, arrears, penalties, portfolio hooks).

drawer.hint: A procedure is identified by an immutable code; only its status makes it executable.

fields.codeImmutable: The code cannot be changed after creation.
fields.codeSelectHint: Only procedures the backend has a handler for are offered.
fields.codeNotExecutableWarning: This code has no backend handler: the procedure will be saved but its runs will fail.
fields.name: Name
fields.scheduleHint: Indicative: the real cadence is driven by the engine / day close.
fields.metadataHint: Optional JSON object (e.g. scheduling parameters). Leave empty if unused.
fields.metadataInvalid: Invalid JSON: enter a valid JSON object.

execute.title: Execute the procedure?
execute.message: Execution applies the procedure for the business date. Prerequisite controls are checked server-side.

retry.title: Retry the run?
retry.message: The run goes back to pending and can be executed again.

cancel.title: Cancel the run?
cancel.message: Only a pending run that has not started can be cancelled.

drawer.hint: Creates a pending run. Then launch it via "Execute".

fields.notExecutableWarning: This procedure has no backend handler: executing it will fail. Pick an executable procedure.
fields.closeControlWarning: Close-control procedure: it is driven by the accounting-day close (requires a day link) and does not run standalone here.
fields.inactiveWarning: Inactive procedure: activate it in the Procedures tab before it can be executed.
fields.agencyHint: Leave empty for an institution-level run.

denominations.pageDescription: Reference data for cash denominations (banknotes and coins) and their value, used for cash counting.

fields.codeEditHint: The code is immutable after creation.
fields.label: Label
fields.currencyEditHint: The currency is immutable after creation.

drawer.hint: Set the value and the type (banknote or coin).

denominationCounter.title: Cash breakdown
denominationCounter.none: No active denomination for this currency. Configure them in Cash denominations.

accountingDay.pageDescription: Open, close and reopen the institution's accounting day. Once the day is closed the system switches to consultation-only mode and all registration is blocked until the next day is opened.

scopePicker.label: Viewing scope
scopePicker.hint: Choose the institution or an agency to view and manage its accounting day.

current.noneBody: No day is open for your scope. The system is in consultation-only mode: registering any operation is blocked until a day is opened.
current.closingBody: Close controls are running. Registration is blocked until the day is finalised. Finalise the close once the controls pass.
current.openSessionsBody: Close every teller session before starting the day-close. Otherwise the day stays stuck in closing (sessions can no longer be closed once the close has started).
current.openSessionsBlock: Close the open teller sessions first.
current.errorTitle: Could not load the accounting day

open.title: Open an accounting day
open.description: Starts a new accounting day and re-enables registration for the chosen scope.
open.scopeHint: An institution day covers every agency; an agency day covers a single agency.
open.agencyHint: Leave empty to use your home agency.
open.dateHint: Leave empty to derive the next business date automatically.

reopen.title: Reopen the accounting day
reopen.description: Reopens the accounting day of {date}. Registration becomes possible again for that day.
reopen.descriptionNoDate: Reopens the closed accounting day. Registration becomes possible again for that day.
reopen.warningBody: Reopening a closed day is a sensitive, audited operation. It should only be used to correct a closing mistake.
reopen.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this day must be reopened…
reopen.reasonError: The reason must be at least {min} characters long.
reopen.reasonHint: At least {min} characters. This reason is kept in the audit log.

startClose.title: Start closing?
startClose.body: Starting the close runs the end-of-day controls and blocks new registrations. You will then finalise the close once the controls pass.

close.title: Close the day?
close.body: Closing finalises the accounting day. The system switches to consultation-only mode until the next day is opened. This can only succeed once every close control passes.

toast.openedBody: The accounting day of {date} is open.
toast.reopenedBody: The accounting day of {date} has been reopened.
toast.startClosedBody: Close controls are running. Registration is now blocked.
toast.closedBody: The accounting day was closed successfully.
